# Pull Request Template


## What Changed 
- I have added the GitHub PR template to automate future pull requests.
- I have created a self-review checklist in the docs folder.
- I have updated the README with instructions on how to run the project.

## Why
This is to satisfy the Phase 3 PR Hygiene requirements and ensure all code is reviewed against a standard set of rules before merging.

## How to Test 
1. Run `ls -a .github` to see the template.
2. Run `ls docs` to see the checklist.
3. Read the updated README.md file.

## Checklist
- [x] My code follows the project style.
- [x] All files are in their correct directories.
